（融合大部分现代军旅题材，平行世界，没有系统，以孤狼B组为开头展开后续剧情，并以先知未来走向调整部分人物结局，弥补遗憾，增加爽点。）
一名优秀的特战指挥官魂穿到刚刚从军校毕业的吴征身上，被任命的单位正是海军陆战队两栖侦察连，并成为了特一里面那个搞笑卫生员的排长。
史大凡：“排长，我就是个卫生员。”
吴征：“那就更要加练啊。”
邓振华：“放过我吧！”
吴征：“不行，狙击手更要加强体能训练。”
春雷行动中，狗头老高看着眼前的黑虎大队长雷克鸣说道：“你赶紧去抓那帮小子吧，不然我怕到时候你收不住场面。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9852949639869fae4ee374b03529378d","author":"执固","author_id":"","book_id":"7569838615983819801","book_name":"狼牙：我成了史大凡的排长","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#283828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7569838728001094169","read_count":"56996","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"395609"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.8","serial_count":"175","tags":"男频衍生,穿越,特种兵,同人,魂穿,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/22864302b14a936ab52e34f6749983c0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779178270&x-signature=5sSBoD6Q1pnS2DHpY4eufq0AB2s%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3483710135474327","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201611101A7D9AD87CD660FEC321"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_c
